creator: Lucas Ropek
title: (No AI) Sundar Pichai faces boos, walkout at Stanford graduation ceremony over Google’s Israel, ICE ties
dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
content: AI is once again at the heart of a college graduation protest — this time for the technology's use in Google's defense contracts.
contentSnippet: AI is once again at the heart of a college graduation protest — this time for the technology's use in Google's defense contracts.

creator: Zack Whittaker
title: (No AI) The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
content: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.
contentSnippet: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

title: (No AI) Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
author: Hayden Field
content:
![Collage of the Pentagon in Washington DC with binary code in the background.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/STKS515_CYBER_WARFARE2_D.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models by "any foreign national" inside or outside the US, "including foreign national Anthropic employees." The only way that was possible, Anthropic determined, was to completely [disable](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/949553/anthropic-fable-5-mythos-5-government-national-security) products it spent the [past week hyping](https://www.theverge.com/news/946725/anthropic-releases-claude-fable-5-mythos) - and travel to Washington, DC in hopes of changing President Donald Trump's mind. Now, over the com …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/950412/anthropic-trump-adminstration-claude-mythos-fable-5-export-controls)
contentSnippet:
As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models by "any foreign national" inside or outside the US, "including foreign national Anthropic employees." The only way that was possible, Anthropic determined, was to completely disable products it spent the past week hyping - and travel to Washington, DC in hopes of changing President Donald Trump's mind. Now, over the com …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
author: Stevie Bonifield
content:
![A screenshot of AI-generated search results in Meta’s AI Mode on Facebook](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/videoframe_7395.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Your public Facebook posts could help inform AI-generated results in [Meta's new AI Mode](https://about.fb.com/news/2026/06/new-ai-tools-to-help-you-make-things-happen-on-facebook/). When you search on Facebook, the "AI Mode" option will appear alongside the usual search modes like "People" and "Marketplace." It's one of several new AI features Meta is rolling out starting today, including photo presets that swap sports jerseys onto fans and suggestions for collage templates.

![A screenshot of AI-generated search results in Meta's AI Mode on Facebook](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/videoframe_29515.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100 "A screenshot of AI-generated search results in Meta's AI Mode on Facebook")

Instead of "just links," it gives users AI-generated results that pull from publicly-posted content across Meta's platforms, like the AI search feature in its [new Reddit-like Forum app](https://www.theverge.com/tech/936290/meta-forum-facebook-groups-app-hands-on). Users can also ask Meta's AI follow-up questions in response to the search …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/950264/meta-ai-mode-search-facebook)

Instead of "just links," it gives users AI-generated results that pull from publicly-posted content across Meta's platforms, like the AI search feature in its new Reddit-like Forum app. Users can also ask Meta's AI follow-up questions in response to the search  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
content: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
contentSnippet: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

title: (No AI) New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
content: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

title: (No AI) Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
content: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.
contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

creator: Molly Taft
title: (No AI) DOJ Lawyers Argue xAI Is ‘Vital’ for National Security in NAACP Lawsuit
dc:creator: Molly Taft
content: In a bid to dismiss a lawsuit over xAI’s polluting gas turbines, the Justice Department claimed the company is integral to military operations—including the Iran War.
contentSnippet: In a bid to dismiss a lawsuit over xAI’s polluting gas turbines, the Justice Department claimed the company is integral to military operations—including the Iran War.

creator: Hugo Lowell, Lily Hay Newman, Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) Anthropic Is Still at Odds With the White House Over Claude Fable 5
dc:creator: Hugo Lowell, Lily Hay Newman, Maxwell Zeff
content: Anthropic leaders flew to Washington, DC, to meet with White House officials on Monday. After high-level talks, they’re still split on the risk Claude Fable 5 presents.
contentSnippet: Anthropic leaders flew to Washington, DC, to meet with White House officials on Monday. After high-level talks, they’re still split on the risk Claude Fable 5 presents.
